roa.docketEntryComment: PPL OPPOSITION TO DEF MOTION TO SUPPRESS, FILED
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL: DISPOSITION/INTC/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLEMOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,19002073,/
/CAL: RETURN ON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/SHER/BAIL:100,000/LDPX: 03-04-19 (60TH DAY)/VD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 02-28-19/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARYHEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE TODAY'S PRELIMINARY HEARING IS GRANTED,/NTW60/LDPX:03-04-19/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 01-15-19 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:1-16-19/987,2/BAIL:100,000/X:BAIL SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SA2:INTERSTECTION OF 11TH & HARRISON ST, SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/ /CONTD: PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT 1-4-19/DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING 1-15-19/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/LDPX:03-04-19 (60TH)/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 10/TRANS 10:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOPC/
